code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if i > n
    let start1 = i - 1
    mut j = start1
    while j < n
      match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          j = n + 1
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      when None
        j = n
      end
    end
    let end1 = if j > n
      j - 1
    else
      n
    end
    mut k = end1
    while k < n
      match string.byte_at(line, k)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          k = k + 1
        else
          k = n + 1
        end
      when None
        k = n
      end
    end
    if k > n
      let start2 = k - 1
      mut m = start2
      while m < n
        match string.byte_at(line, m)
        when Some(b)
          if is_ws(b)
            m = n + 1
          else
            m = m + 1
          end
        when None
          m = n
        end
      end
      let end2 = if m > n
        m - 1
      else
        n
      end
      string.parse_int(string.substring(line, start2, end2))
    else
      None
    end
  else
    None
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match parse_line(line)
    when Some(v)
      total = total + v
    when None
      total = total
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
